titleStmt.title: SII 18.97: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 97. (B.K. No. 12 of 1933-34.) BANKĀPUR, SHIGGAON TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Hero-stone in Survey No. 2 of Aṅkada-khaṇa, hamlet of Baṅkāpur.

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva is dated in the Chālukya-Vikrama year 13, Śukla, Phālguṇa śu. 5, Sunday. The date is irregular. The tithi cited corresponds to A.D. 1090, February 7, which was a Thursday.

It commemorates the death of a hero named Mārasiṁga-nāyaka in a fight at the capital town of Baṅkāpura. Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Kaliyamarasa is stated to be governing Pānuṅgal Five-hundred. He bears the epithet Chandaladēviyagandhavāraṇa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
samastabuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha mahājādhirāja
ra paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyā
śrīmattṛbhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhi

pravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhi
gatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ jayāṁganādhīśvaraṁ śrīsōmē
śvaradēvalabdhavaraprasādaṁ dānavinōdaṁ candaladēviya gandhavāraṇaṁ
ripumadanivāraṇa śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara kaliyamarasarpā

nuṁgallaynūṟumaṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadināḷdarasugeyyuttamire cā
ḷukyavikramakāḷada 13 neya śuklasaṁvatsarada phālguṇa su 5 Āditya
vāradaṁdu śrīpoḷalpaṭṭaṇaṁ rājadhāni baṁkāpuradoḷ paṭṭagāraṟarkka�
ya pokkiṟivalli pervvesada mārasiṁganāyakaṁ taḷtiṟidu dēvalōkakke sa
nda © © ©
Digital edition of SII 18.97 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
